description_long: This helicopter features a streamlined, aerodynamic fuselage with a rounded nose and a large, multi-pane cockpit window array. The main rotor is mounted centrally on the roof, with long, slender blades extending outward, while the tail boom tapers to a vertical stabilizer and a small tail rotor. The landing gear consists of two robust, straight skids that provide stable ground support. The exterior is primarily a light gray or white color, with minimal visible markings and a smooth, matte finish. The cockpit windows are arranged in a grid pattern, offering wide visibility for pilots. No visible registration numbers or alphanumeric markings are present on the body.
description: A sleek, light-colored helicopter with a rounded nose, large cockpit windows, central main rotor, and straight landing skids. The design is streamlined and modern, with minimal markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded nose, large multi-pane cockpit windows, and the symmetrical placement of the landing skids.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, main rotor, and the straight landing skids, as well as the tail boom and vertical stabilizer.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tapering tail boom, vertical stabilizer, and the tail rotor, with the skids visible beneath the fuselage.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the main rotor, cockpit window arrangement, and the tail structure.
attribute_rotor_blades: The main rotor has two long, straight blades made of composite material, colored light gray with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: The tail rotor is present, mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, with two short blades, also light gray and unmarked.
attribute_landing_skids: The landing skids are straight, tubular, and made of metal, colored white with black footpads at the ends, and are connected by crossbars for stability.
attribute_cockpit_windows: There are six cockpit windows arranged in a grid pattern, rectangular in shape, with dark tint and thin framing, providing wide forward and side visibility.
